name: QuickFixGolf
about: QuickFixGolf offers virtual golf instruction through a mobile and web application, connecting players with PGA Certified Instructors for personalized coaching. The service allows users to record their golf swings, receive video analysis with customized drills and feedback within 48 hours, and access an online academy with hours of instructional content. Designed for improvement from anywhere, it's a technology-driven platform focused on skill development rather than traditional on-course or simulator bay play.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to PGA Certified Instructors from anywhere in the world
Detailed video swing analysis with personalized feedback within 48 hours
Online academy with hours of on-demand lessons and training resources

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, to record and analyze your swing, you will need access to your own golf clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: This is a virtual coaching service, so you can participate from your home with your own food and drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: QuickFixGolf is a virtual coaching platform, not a simulator for playing full rounds. The time commitment depends on your lesson and analysis package.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, QuickFixGolf is suitable for juniors and youth golfers of all skill levels, providing instruction tailored to individual needs.
